title: Decimillipede

moves.title: Reattach
effects: Trigger Reattach power to rejoin the Decimillipede

move_pattern: Starting move is determined by StarterMoveIdx % 3: 0 = Writhe, 1 = Bulk, 2 = Constrict. Normal cycle: Writhe → Constrict → Bulk → Writhe (repeating). When defeated, plays Dead then Reattach to rejoin the main body, then resumes with a random move.
notes: Front segment of the Decimillipede boss. Inherits all gameplay logic from DecimillipedeSegment; only overrides the SegmentAttack animation method.
